Claude Desktop

 Linux (native):
 $HOME/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json

 Linux (Flatpak):
 $HOME/.var/app/com.anthropic.Claude/config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json

 {
 "mcpServers": {
 "cem": {
 "command": "cem",
 "args": [
 "mcp"
 ]
 }
 }
 }
 Restart Claude Desktop after applying.
